data.title: Rio Tinto AGM Highlights Shareholder Dynamics and Strategic Decisions
data.description:
Rio Tinto ( (GB:RIO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Rio Tinto plc held its annual general meeting on April 3, 2025, where several resolutions were voted on by shareholders. Notably, Resolution 22, which authorizes the purchase of Rio Tinto plc shares, passed with less than 80% approval, primarily due to opposition from Chinalco, a significant shareholder. This decision highlights Chinalco’s growing influence, as its stake now approaches the agreed threshold with the Australian Government. The results of other resolutions will be announced after the Rio Tinto Limited meeting in May.

More about Rio Tinto

Rio Tinto is a leading global mining group that focuses on finding, mining, and processing mineral resources. The company primarily deals in commodities such as iron ore, aluminum, copper, and diamonds, with a significant market presence across the globe.

YTD Price Performance: 1.02%

Average Trading Volume: 2,953,537

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £79.41B

data.title: YSB Inc. Announces Share Awards Under 2023 Incentive Plan
data.description:
YSB Inc. ( (HK:9885) ) has shared an announcement.

YSB Inc. has announced the grant of 980,000 award shares under its 2023 Share Incentive Plan, representing approximately 0.14% of the total issued shares. These shares are granted to 10 employee participants and will vest between April 2026 and April 2028, subject to individual performance evaluations. The plan includes a clawback mechanism that allows the company to reclaim shares under certain conditions, such as misconduct or breach of company policy.

More about YSB Inc.

data.title: Kongsberg NanoAvionics Secures Major Satellite Contract with SpinLaunch
data.description:
Kongsberg Gruppen ASA ( (NSKFF) ) has issued an announcement.

Kongsberg NanoAvionics has been selected by SpinLaunch as the exclusive satellite supplier for the Meridian Space low earth orbit broadband communication constellation, signing a contract for 280 microsatellites worth EUR122.5 million. This partnership aims to deliver a new approach to space-based broadband, offering higher performance and launch efficiency with lighter satellites, and underscores Kongsberg’s commitment to affordable and sustainable space services. The collaboration also involves Kongsberg Defence & Aerospace acquiring a minority stake in SpinLaunch to support the commercialization of the innovative satcom solution, which is designed to meet the growing demand for flexible, high-speed, and secure satellite communication services across various sectors.

More about Kongsberg Gruppen ASA

KONGSBERG is an international, knowledge-based group that provides high-technology systems and solutions across various markets, including defence, security, maritime, energy, aerospace, climate mapping, and subsea technology. The company employs over 14,600 people in more than 40 countries and reported a total revenue of NOK 48.9 billion in 2024.

Average Trading Volume: 845

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $26.53B

data.title: Nexus AG Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
An announcement from NEXUS AG ( (DE:NXU) ) is now available.

Nexus AG has announced a change in voting rights, with The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. crossing a threshold of 3% voting rights through its subsidiary, Goldman Sachs International. This adjustment in voting rights could influence Nexus AG’s shareholder dynamics and potentially impact its strategic decisions, reflecting the company’s ongoing engagement with international financial entities.

More about NEXUS AG

Nexus AG is a company based in Donaueschingen, Germany, operating in the healthcare industry. It is involved in the development and provision of software solutions for the healthcare sector, focusing on improving hospital management and patient care.

data.title: Nevro Corp Completes Merger and Delists from NYSE
data.description:
Nevro Corp ( (NVRO) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 3, 2025, Nevro Corp, a company involved in the medical technology sector, completed a merger with Globus, resulting in Nevro becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Globus. In conjunction with this merger, Nevro terminated its $200 million credit agreement, repaid approximately $227.1 million, and requested the delisting of its shares from the NYSE. Additionally, Nevro’s board of directors resigned, and new directors from Merger Sub were appointed, while Nevro’s incorporation documents were amended.

More about Nevro Corp

data.description:

Automation Systems S.p.A. has initiated a mandatory public purchase offer for the ordinary shares of Piovan S.p.A., leading to the delisting of Piovan’s shares from Euronext STAR Milan. This move, following the completion of a joint procedure, involves the acquisition of residual shares and the transfer of ownership to Automation Systems, impacting Piovan’s market presence and shareholder structure.

Guotai Haitong Securities Co., Ltd. announced the election of both non-independent and independent directors for the seventh session of its board, along with the appointment of key leadership roles including chairman, vice chairman, and president. These changes are expected to influence the company’s governance structure and strategic direction, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

data.title: Bachem Proposes New Board Member with Extensive Life Sciences Experience
data.description:
Bachem Holding AG ( (CH:BANB) ) has provided an announcement.

Bachem Holding AG announced the proposal of Dr. Simone Wyss Fedele, CEO of Switzerland Global Enterprise, for election as a new member of its Board of Directors at the upcoming General Meeting in April 2025. Dr. Fedele brings extensive experience in the life sciences industry and international trade, having held leadership roles at Novartis and Takeda Pharmaceuticals. Her addition is expected to enhance Bachem’s strategic positioning and strengthen its board with her international expertise and connections.

More about Bachem Holding AG

Bachem is a leading, innovation-driven company specializing in the development and manufacture of peptides and oligonucleotides. It provides pharmaceutical and biotech companies worldwide with products for research, clinical development, and commercial application. Headquartered in Switzerland, Bachem operates internationally with locations in Europe, the USA, and Asia, and is listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
